---
subtitle: Sharing Trustworthy Data for Coordinated Actions
keywords: 
  - data sovereignty
  - interoperability
  - federated trust
  - sustainable consumption and production
  - Safe and Sustainable by Design
  - tech sovereignty
---
# Sovereign Industrial Data Spaces (IDS) {#sec-industrial-data-spaces}

::: {.chapterabstract}
Draft abstract: this chapter specifies the federated, non-blockchain
data-sovereignty layer that governs access to the DPP data defined in
Chapter 7.
:::

::: {.keywords}
Industrial Data Space &middot; data sovereignty &middot; federated trust &middot; usage control
:::

## 8.1 Data Sovereignty Principles and Federated Trust Frameworks
- Explicitly non-blockchain: usage-control rules over a trust anchor
  rather than a distributed ledger.
- Extension via blockchain possible: how a distributed ledger helps.

## 8.2 Usage Control Rules and Cross-Border Data Governance
- Contractual and technical enforcement of "who may use what, how, and
  for how long."

## 8.3 Interoperability with DPP Outputs
- Closing the loop back to @sec-digital-product-passports.

::: {.callout-tip title="Bridge to Chapter 9"}
Chapter 9 closes the book by aligning this data layer with regional
trade and regulatory frameworks.
:::
